title: ThirdPartyCosmetics
description: An extension that adds support for loading ears and other third party cosmetics on java players on Geyser
body:
# ThirdPartyCosmetics

[![forthebadge made-with-java](https://forthebadge.com/images/badges/made-with-java.svg)](https://java.com/)

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/613163671870242838.svg?color=%237289da&label=discord)](http://discord.geysermc.org/)
[![Download](https://img.shields.io/badge/download-ThirdPartyCosmetics.jar-orange)](https://geysermc.org/download/?project=other-projects&thirdpartycosmetics=expanded)

ThirdPartyCosmetics is an extension that adds support for loading ears and other third party cosmetics on java players

### Currently supported providers:
| Name | Cosmetics |
| --- | --- |
| [MinecraftCapes](https://minecraftcapes.net/) | Ears, Capes |
| [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/) | Capes |
| [LabyMod](https://www.labymod.net/) | Capes |
